offer.noCommonFriendsExplanation: You have no common friends. What does this mean?
offer.noCommonFriends.title: You have no common friends
offer.noCommonFriends.description: You see this offer because the other person has your phone number saved in their contact list. Be cautious; we can't verify whether you really know each other in real life.

offer.clubOffer.description: You see this offer because the other person is a member of the same club as you. Be cautious; we can't verify whether you really know each other in real life.

offer.report.inappropriateContentWasRepo: O conteúdo inadequado foi comunicado anonimamente.

offer.archive.confirmFromFavoritesDescri: Archiving will remove this offer from your favorites. Do you want to continue?
offer.report.reportLimitReached: Você atingiu o número máximo de relatórios para hoje. Tente novamente em 24 horas.
offer.interactedRecently: You've already interacted with this trade recently.
offer.canSendAgainTomorrow: You'll be able to send another message tomorrow.

offer.requestStatus.requested: Pediu uma troca. Iremos notificá-lo quando for aceite.
offer.requestStatus.initial: Esta será a sua primeira interação com esta oferta.

offer.requestStatus.deleted: You already chatted with this person about this offer, but you deleted the chat.

offer.requestStatus.leaved: Ya has interactuado antes con esta oferta
offer.offerFromFriendOfFriend: Oferta de um amigo de um amigo
offer.youSeeThisOfferBecause: You see this offer because the other person has your phone number saved in their contacts.
offer.beCautiousWeCannotVerify: Be cautious; we can't verify whether you really know each other in real life.
offer.dontForgetToVerifyTheIdentity: Não se esqueça de verificar a sua identidade com um contacto comum.
offer.youSeeThisClubOfferBecause: You see this offer because it was posted in a club you are part of. Don't forget to verify the identity of the person you are trading with.
offer.noDirectConnection: Este é um contacto com o qual não tem qualquer ligação direta.
offer.rerequestDays: Você pode enviar outro pedido em {{days}} dias.
offer.requestWasCancelledOrAccountDelete: It seems like the other person has cancelled the request or deleted their account. Do you want to delete this request?
offer.requestNotFound: Can't continue — the other person deleted their account.
offer.otherSideAccountDeleted: The other person has deleted their account
termsOfUse.dontHaveTime2: Short on time? Check the FAQs instead.
termsOfUse.cautiousNoticeAboutMachineTra: Caution: The following text was machine translated for your convenience. To access the original English version, continue to the web.
faqs.vexlIsPlatform: Vexl is a platform where you can trade bitcoin within your real-world social network: your friends and friends of friends, while staying completely anonymous if you wish.
faqs.whoCanSeeMyContacts: Quem pode ver os meus contactos?
faqs.peopleWhomYouAllowToSee: As pessoas a quem permites ver a tua identidade podem ver o teu nome e a tua imagem de perfil, e é só.
faqs.howCanIStayAnonymous: How can I stay anonymous and still use Vexl?
faqs.byDefaultYouParticipateInTheNetwork: By default, you participate in the network under the Vexl name and avatar you were given during registration. You can reveal your identity only for a particular trade in our secure, end-to-end encrypted chat.
faqs.howDoIKnowWhoIAmTalkingTo: How do I know who I am talking to?
faqs.oneChallenge: Um dos desafios dos sistemas de comunicação verdadeiramente anónimos como o Vexl é que, por vezes, é necessário verificar a identidade da pessoa com quem se está a falar! Nestes casos, é melhor utilizar um canal de comunicação secundário seguro para confirmar com a outra pessoa que ambos são quem dizem ser.
faqs.areMyChatsAndDealsPrivate: Are my chats and deals private?
faqs.vexlIsOpensource: Vexl is open source; anyone can look for backdoors or malicious intent. You can also read the independent security audit report.
faqs.howDoYouProtectMyData: How do you protect my data?
faqs.vexlIsDesigned: Vexl is designed to never collect or store any sensitive information. Vexl messages and other content can't be accessed by us or any third parties because they're always end-to-end encrypted, private, and secure. Our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy are available below.
faqs.youCanAlwaysReachOutToUs: You can always reach out to us via email: support@vexl.it. For private communication, you can also send us end-to-end encrypted mail. Or you can meet us during your next P2P trade! 😻
faqs.whatAreVexlClubsAndWhyShouldIJoin: What are Vexl Clubs and why should I join?
faqs.clubsConnectYouWithBroaderNetwork: Clubs connect you with a broader network, enabling opportunities outside your immediate friends. While Clubs offer more variety, trading within them is less secure than with Level 1 or Level 2 friends.
offerForm.discardNewOfferDescription: If you close this now, all details you've entered will be discarded.
offerForm.whatDoYouWantToDo: What do you want to do?
offerForm.exchangeRateRequestTimedOutDes: The request timed out. Check your internet connection and try again later.
offerForm.location.onlineTradeWarning: In-person trades are safer. Learn what to look out for when trading online.
offerForm.location.meetingInPersonSafer: Meeting in person is safer. Don't share your home address unless you fully trust the other person.
offerForm.location.receivePaymentsSafely:
Money sent by a random person may come from criminal activity and be traceable. Never send bitcoin before receiving payment.

Always check that the name on the payment matches what the other person told you.

Share the address securely and verify it through another secure channel.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.sellDescript: Add a discount to sell faster, or a premium to earn more. See how it affects demand by moving the slider.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.buyDescripti: Add a discount to buy at a lower price, or a premium to buy faster. See how it affects demand by moving the slider.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youBuyForThe: You buy at the current market price. Move the slider to buy more cheaply or faster.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.theOptimalPo: The optimal position for most people. You buy slightly faster, but a bit above market price.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youBuyReally: You buy quickly, but well above the market price.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youBuyPretty: You buy fairly cheaply, but it can take slightly longer to find a seller.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youBuyVeryCh: You buy very cheaply, but it can take a while to find a seller.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youSellForTh: Vende pelo preço real de mercado. Use a barra deslizante para vender mais depressa ou ganhar mais.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youEarnBitMo: Ganha um pouco mais, mas pode demorar um pouco mais.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youEarnSoMuc: You earn much more, but it can take a while.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youSellSligh: Vende um pouco mais depressa, mas um pouco abaixo do preço de mercado
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.youSellMuchF: Vende muito mais depressa, mas muito abaixo do preço de mercado
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.selli: You're selling at market price. Slide left to sell faster, or right to earn more.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.earnB: You'll earn a bit more, but it may take slightly longer to find a buyer.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.earnM: You'll earn significantly more, but finding a buyer may take longer.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.sellS: You'll sell faster, but for slightly less than market price.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.slider.sellM: You'll sell very quickly, but well below market price.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.influenceImp: Influence the impact of your offer. Sell faster by adding a discount, or earn more by adding a premium to the bitcoin market price.
Influence the impact of your offer. Buy for less by adding a discount, or buy faster by adding a premium to the bitcoin market price.
offerForm.premiumOrDiscount.playWithItAn: Play with it and see how it affects others’ interest.
offerForm.buyCheaperByUsingDiscount: Buy for less by using a discount, or buy faster by adding a premium to the bitcoin market price.
offerForm.sellFasterWithDiscount: Vender mais depressa com um desconto ou ganhar mais dinheiro adicionando um prémio ao preço de mercado da bitcoin.
offerForm.location.meetingInPerson: Meeting in person is safer. Learn what to watch out for online.
offerForm.location.whatToWatchOutForOnli: A que é que devemos estar atentos na Internet?
offerForm.location.moneySentByRandomPers: Money sent by a random person can come from criminal activity and be traceable.
offerForm.location.neverSendCrypto: Nunca envie bitcoin antes de receber o pagamento.
offerForm.location.alwaysVerifyTheName: Always check that the name on the payment matches what the other person told you.
offerForm.location.forwardTheAddress: Envie o endereço de forma segura e certifique-se de que o verifica através de outro canal seguro.
offerForm.location.setAreaDescription: Set the area where you're willing to meet for a trade. This helps show you relevant offers nearby.
offerForm.location.meetingAreaDescriptio: Set where you're willing to meet. You'll see offers whose meeting area overlaps yours.
offerForm.pickupDescription: Set the approximate location for the meetup and item exchange.
offerForm.deliveryDescription: Arrange delivery of the item with a third-party service.
offerForm.pickupDeliveryIsSafer: In-person pickups are more secure. Keep your home address private unless you trust the other person.
offerForm.thePriceIsFixedToFiat: O preço é definido em fiat e depois aproximado em BTC.
offerForm.thisItemDoesNotHaveSetPrice: This item doesn't have a set price.
offerForm.network.theBestOption: A melhor opção para montantes muito pequenos. Normalmente muito rápido.
offerForm.network.lightningDescription: Best for smaller amounts. Fast and cheap.
offerForm.network.theBestFor: A melhor opção para quantias maiores. Mais lento.
offerForm.network.onChainDescription: Best for larger amounts. Slower, but more secure.
offerForm.description.writeWhyPeopleShou: Escreve porque é que as pessoas devem aceitar a tua oferta.
offerForm.description.moreAboutYourItem: Explique mais, sobre o seu artigo, aos potenciais compradores.
offerForm.description.whatAreYouLookingF: Explique mais, aos potenciais vendedores, do que está à procura.
offerForm.description.tellSellersMoreAbo: Explique mais, sobre o seu pedido, aos potenciais compradores.
offerForm.description.tellBuyersMoreAbou: Explique mais sobre a sua oferta aos potenciais compradores.
offerForm.seemsYouHaveReachNoVexlers: It looks like there's no one to encrypt your offer for yet. Add more contacts or join a Vexl Club to grow your reach.
offerForm.errorSearchingForAvailableLoca: Error while searching for available locations
offerForm.offerEncryption.dontShutDownTh: Não desligue a aplicação durante a encriptação. Pode demorar vários minutos.
offerForm.offerEncryption.dontCloseTheAp: Don’t close the app while encrypting. This can take a while.
offerForm.offerEncryption.yourFriendsAnd: Os seus amigos e os amigos dos amigos deles podem agora ver a sua oferta.

suggestion.whatAreClubs2: What are Vexl Clubs and why should I join?
suggestion.whatAreClubs2Text: Clubs expand your network beyond your direct contacts, so you see more offers. Keep in mind that trading with club members is less trusted than trading with your close friends.
suggestion.howDoIJoinClub: How do I join a club?
suggestion.howDoIJoinClubText: Ask around in your local BTC meetups or Bitcoin communities. Many already have their own clubs. If you run a community or organize meetups, contact us at marketing@vexl.it and we will help you create a new club.
addContactDialog.youHaveAddedContactToVe: Você adicionou {{contactName}} aos seus contactos da Vexa.
You have added {{contactName}} to your Vexl contacts and your phone's address book.
addContactDialog.youCanEditThisContactAn: You can edit this contact anytime.
addContactDialog.contactAddedToVexlOnlyD: Vexl could not save this contact to your phone because Contacts access is disabled. Open settings to allow access.
addContactDialog.contactCouldNotBeSavedT: The contact was not added to Vexl because it could not be saved to your phone contacts. Try again, or turn off "Also save to your phone" to add it only to Vexl.
